examples: My belt buckle slips inside the windowsill.
I'm trying to put the flowerpot on the windowsill.
As you can see in the photo, a group of mallards lives under the windowsill of a bank office in Spokane, Washington.
Old men lean on the outside windowsill, ordering cortados (espresso with milk) and empanadas to go.
She gazed around wearily, her eyes alighting on the wilted plants on the windowsill.
